name: construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent bid formats cause confusion and errors in estimating. We convert bid documents into standardized templates instead of manual formatting of bid documents.
problem_solved: Inconsistent bid formats lead to confusion and errors in estimating.
